scripts.dev:backend: cd apps/backend && uv run --python 3.11 uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @tuneforge/desktop lint && cd apps/backend && uv run --python 3.11 ruff check . && uv run --python 3.11 mypy app
scripts.package:mac: pnpm --filter @tuneforge/desktop tauri build --bundles app && node scripts/package-dmg.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @tuneforge/desktop test --run && cd apps/backend && uv run --python 3.11 pytest
